item.title: Healey visits Cyprus after criticism of UK response to drone attacks
item.description: The Cypriot government has criticised how the UK has handled information sharing after drone attacks.

item.title: Failed asylum seeker families to be offered up to £40k to leave UK
item.description: The home secretary says the "incentives" will deliver a "significant saving to the taxpayer".

item.title: First UK government flight departs Middle East after delay
item.description: The plane was due to leave Oman on Wednesday but remained grounded due to problems getting passengers on board.

item.title: MP's husband and two men bailed after arrests over alleged China spying
item.description: One of those arrested is the husband of Scottish Labour MP Joani Reid.

item.title: How relegation could cost Spurs more than £250m
item.description: BBC Sport explores the potential financial impact should Spurs be relegated to the Championship.
